message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 444 — Mutex/RwLock wrapper cancel notes

Attaches tick-444 bead comment noting the Mutex + RwLock doc
additions (commit ae2589e4). All 12 cx-first primitive surfaces in
runtime_compat now self-document their cancel semantics.
